guest_letters.title: Send your articles to the East of Indus newspaper
guest_letters.body: By adding the prefix !eastofindus to your post, and writing your title after that, you can send an article through induschan, which will be published on iac and displayed in the next edition of the newspaper, in the morning or the evening! There is no censorship, there is quality control, and there is a 50 word minimum, send your writing!!!
guest_letters.name: India Abstract Culture

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of incel frustration developed over the board early today, with one anon inquiring about transforming into a 'Chad' in just two months. The discussion drew a flurry of skeptical replies.

A scattered high-pressure front of genetic determinism moved in during the morning, with a respondent suggesting a genetic component to sexual desire and linking it to caste.

The topic sparked debate, with several posters weighing in on the role of biology versus environment. A brief but intense downpour of obscenity occurred in the afternoon, when an anon claimed to have been 'LINGAMMED'.

Nearby, a gentle breeze of meta discussion blew in, as a new blog began aggregating /b/ content in a newspaper format. The board's usual overcast of misogyny and racism persisted throughout the day.

articles.title: Incel Seeks Transformation into Chad in 2 Months
articles.body:
Anon opened a thread asking how to achieve an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' One respondent suggested that getting in shape was possible within that timeframe, but changing personality was harder, especially for those with autism.

Another anon recommended a high-carb diet and exercise, suggesting at least 200 grams of simple carbs daily.

A different approach came from an anon who advised dropping labels like 'randi' and instead identifying women who are promiscuous simply as such. This, they claimed, could enhance one's chances of meeting such women.

Anon also discussed practical steps like getting a vasectomy, citing the economic challenges of having children. One respondent jokingly suggested that the government wants more population growth to create more 'slaves' for their kids.

In a more direct approach, one anon bluntly advised the OP to 'go to the gym, eat protein, sleep, grow a beard, get a haircut, stop fapping, stop bitching, stop whining, [and] stop being a fucking loser.' The thread also included some tangents, such as a debate over the use of Hindi abuses and discussions about types of underwear.

Anon also exchanged views on learning sequences, with one suggesting that learning the first 100 terms of the Fibonacci sequence could be a test of cognitive abilities.

The discussion was marked by typical board humor and tangents, with some users making jokes or diverting the conversation.

articles.title: Genetics of Sexual Desire and Caste
articles.body:
Anon opened a discussion on the possible genetic component to sexual desires and behaviors, questioning if their inclinations were innate or shaped by exposure to pornography.

They noted that some men, specifically those from certain castes, rarely develop certain fetishes despite equal exposure to explicit content. Another anon suggested that intense feelings and thoughts about sex, relationships, and race can be overwhelming and may benefit from professional help.

This respondent acknowledged the complexity of these emotions, suggesting they could be influenced by personal experiences, societal factors, and biological elements.

A different anon described a scenario where a woman's reaction to a large penis was likened to a primal pleasure, suggesting it was a fitness test for her to match the man's sexual performance.

This was contrasted with the idea that some men may feel inadequate in comparison. A user named Stag distinguished between being a 'stag' and a 'cuck,' claiming stags use bulls as sex toys for their wives without humiliation, while cucks are into humiliation.

Stag outlined specific criteria for selecting a bull, including physical attributes and stamina. The conversation also involved discussions of interracial relationships and sexual performance, with some anons expressing interest in or support for certain fetishes.

One anon mentioned a pornstar who allegedly broke their dick during filming, while another described a video of a woman being lifted and fucked by a man while standing up.

Replies also included jokes and criticisms, such as one anon teasing another about their supposed stag or cuck status. The conversation remained focused on sexual desires, behaviors, and the distinctions between different sexual interests.

articles.title: Anon Sparks Discussion with 'Gobarida Edition' Remark
articles.body:
An anonymous poster sparked a discussion with a one-line remark: 'Gobarida edition.' The original poster's intention behind 'Gobarida edition' was unclear, prompting several anons to seek clarification.

One anon suggested it could refer to a special edition related to biogas or renewable energy, while another considered it might be a typo or a term related to a book, publication, or cultural reference.

However, the conversation quickly took a different turn. Anon discussed the idea of bio-mechanical hybrid flesh robots, specifically 'waifus,' and their potential implications.

One anon imagined a scenario where such a robot could have a human-like exterior but a robotic mind, raising questions about its classification as a robot.

Another anon joked about the possibility of a 'Gobarida Edition' being a knockoff brand that couldn’t afford real marketing. The conversation also touched on societal issues, including the male-to-female ratio and fertility rates.

An anon expressed a desire for a drastically altered demographic, suggesting that the male-to-female ratio should 'chud jaaye' and that there should be four females per male, with a fertility rate of 0.5.

The discussion also involved exchanges about social dynamics, with anons discussing varna sankar and the perceived desirability of individuals from certain backgrounds.

An anon stated a preference for '2D pyaaris over 90% 3Djeetas,' while another expressed a desire to marry a 'sanskari and pyari Shudra girl' if varna sankar were not an issue.

The thread included various other comments, including jokes and criticisms, but remained largely focused on the speculative and societal issues raised by the original post.

articles.title: Anon claims 'LINGAMMED'
articles.body:
Anon posted 'LINGAMMED' as the opening statement. Another anon responded with an apparent reference to a different topic, mentioning that 'Nothing will change lmao.

Yaar Pajeet >Most whites are average to low iq folks and you only get to breed them not upper class whites.' A respondent joked about 'Total Shudra Breed Timmy's Sister plan' manifesting.

Anon reacted to the OP saying the poster was 'Fucking low caste rapist. He should be killed for this'. A later post read 'He chose the matrix path. You'll never see him again.'

articles.title: New Blog Aggregates /b/ Content
articles.body:
India Abstract Culture posted a link to a blogspot page that aggregates content from 4chan's /b/ board into a newspaper-style format.

The blog, found at iac-press.blogspot.com/?eoi, offers daily digests of /b/ posts, a live pulse ticker of trending topics, and a board overview.

Anon respondents noted that /b/ is known for its unmoderated, often offensive content, and suggested that the blog include proper content warnings and age verification. Others questioned the feasibility of manually curating the content, given the board's chaotic nature.

India Abstract Culture explained that the blog uses automated processes to aggregate content, which may lead to the inclusion of AI-generated posts or other unwanted material.

They expressed openness to improving the blog, including potentially adding a feature for users to submit articles.
